x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: The sn_hr_core.interaction and sys_cs_conversation tables store VA and Now Assist interaction history. Sufficient historical data allows Now Assist to learn from past interactions and improve response relevance over time.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Allow Virtual Agent and Now Assist interactions to accumulate. Drive VA adoption through channel expansion and promotion. Ensure interaction data retention policies preserve sufficient history. Target: 1,000+ conversation records in the trailing 90 days.
